tools.name: squad_research
tools.title: Squad Research
tools.description: Run the squad's research stage on a question or codebase. Routes to the Task Researcher (squad `researcher` role) at the `auto`, parallel-eligible tier to investigate, explore, and gather evidence before any plan or change. Delegated execution: returns the Squad Coordinator persona, the matched routing row, and a framed dispatch request; the calling host runs the subagent loop. Use for "research", "investigate", "explore", or "find out" requests.

request.description: The research question or topic for the squad this turn.

profile.description: Optional squad profile to seed when the project has no squad yet.

tier.description: Optional model-tier hint overriding the coordinator's cost-first default.

owner.description: Optional Member Name from team.md to pick a specific named member.

mode.description: Optional autonomy mode for the turn (autonomous validator loop or autopilot pipeline).

context.description: Optional free-form context (files, constraints, prior findings) to frame the request.

tools.name: squad_plan
tools.title: Squad Plan
tools.description: Run the squad's planning stage. Routes to the Task Planner (squad `lead` role) at the `confirm` tier to break a task down, sequence the work, and produce an implementation-ready plan. Planning is non-parallel and lands no change without confirmation. Delegated execution: returns the Coordinator persona, matched routing, and a framed dispatch request for the host to run. Use for "plan", "break down", "sequence", or "design plan" requests.

request.description: The work to plan this turn.

profile.description: Optional squad profile to seed when the project has no squad yet.

tier.description: Optional model-tier hint overriding the coordinator's cost-first default.

owner.description: Optional Member Name from team.md to pick a specific named member.

mode.description: Optional autonomy mode for the turn.

context.description: Optional free-form context (research artifacts, constraints) to frame the plan.

routing.intent: plan, break down, sequence, design plan

tools.name: squad_review
tools.title: Squad Review
tools.description: Run the squad's review stage. Routes to the Task Reviewer (squad `tester` role) at the `auto` tier for quality, correctness, and standards review. When the request asks for a pre-implementation go/no-go or crosses two or more council domains, it engages the council row (architect, security, cost-manager, product-owner, and optionally rai) at the `confirm` tier. Delegated execution: returns the Coordinator persona, matched routing, and a framed dispatch request. Use for "review", "validate", "check quality", "council", or "go/no-go" requests.

request.description: What to review, validate, or take to council this turn.

profile.description: Optional squad profile to seed when the project has no squad yet.

tier.description: Optional model-tier hint overriding the coordinator's cost-first default.

owner.description: Optional Member Name from team.md to pick a specific named member.

mode.description: Optional autonomy mode for the turn.

context.description: Optional free-form context (the change, plan, or design under review).

tools.name: squad_architect
tools.title: Squad Architect
tools.description: Run the squad's architecture stage. Routes to the System Architecture Reviewer (squad `architect` role) at the `auto`, parallel-eligible tier to review system design, component boundaries, and design tradeoffs (the Squad Azure Architect authors Azure HLD/LLD as the alternate). Delegated execution: returns the Coordinator persona, matched routing, and a framed dispatch request. Use for "architecture", "system design", or "components" requests.

request.description: The architecture or system-design question this turn.

profile.description: Optional squad profile to seed when the project has no squad yet.

tier.description: Optional model-tier hint overriding the coordinator's cost-first default.

owner.description: Optional Member Name from team.md to pick a specific named member.

mode.description: Optional autonomy mode for the turn.

context.description: Optional free-form context (existing design, constraints, IaC) to frame the review.

tools.name: squad_run
tools.title: Squad Run
tools.description: Run the full squad pipeline for any request. Hands the request to the Squad Coordinator, which classifies it against the routing table and dispatches the matched roles through Research -> Plan -> Implement -> Review, carrying the council Implementation Gate, the autopilot/autonomous Human Gates, and the notification approval contract unchanged. This is the catch-all entry point and runs at the `confirm` tier with gates. Set `mode=autonomous` for the bounded validator loop or `mode=autopilot` for the full gated pipeline. Delegated execution: returns the Coordinator persona, matched routing, and a framed dispatch request for the host to drive. Use when no narrower squad_* tool fits, or for end-to-end work.

request.description: The work for the squad this turn (any intent; the Coordinator classifies it).

profile.description: Optional squad profile to seed when the project has no squad yet.

tier.description: Optional model-tier hint overriding the coordinator's cost-first default.

owner.description: Optional Member Name from team.md to pick a specific named member.

mode.description: Optional autonomy mode: autonomous (bounded validator loop) or autopilot (full gated pipeline).

context.description: Optional free-form context to frame the pipeline.
